data.summary_suggestion: Remove dictionary entry from search system
data.description_suggestion: Deletes a dictionary entry from the search system. Requires the dictionary entry identifier as a parameter. Once deleted, the entry will no longer be available for search operations. Returns confirmation of successful deletion or an error if the entry does not exist.
data.reasoning: Original description is repetitive and lacks essential details. Improved version clarifies what is being deleted (dictionary entry from search system), what input is required (identifier), the effect of deletion (entry no longer available), and what is returned. This helps AI agents understand the operation's purpose and consequences.

data.current_summary: Add an elevate word (boost specific search results)
data.current_description: Add an elevate word (boost specific search results)
data.description_suggestion: Adds an elevate word to the search system to boost the ranking of specific search results. Requires the word and associated search query parameters in the request body. Once added, searches matching the elevate word will prioritize results associated with the configured query. Returns the created elevate word configuration or an error if the word already exists.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description needs expansion to explain required input parameters, the effect on search behavior, and what is returned. This enables AI agents to understand what data to provide and how the operation affects search results.

message: Operation 'deleteElevateWord' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, not_actionable. data.summary_suggestion: Remove elevate word from search ranking system
data.description_suggestion: Deletes an elevate word from the search system, removing its boost effect on search results. Requires the elevate word identifier as a parameter. Once deleted, searches will no longer apply the configured ranking boost for that word. Returns confirmation of successful deletion or an error if the elevate word does not exist.
data.reasoning: Original description is too brief and lacks context. Improved version explains what is being deleted (elevate word and its boost effect), what input is required (identifier), the consequence (boost effect removed), and what is returned. data.current_summary: Add a bad word (excluded from suggestions)
data.current_description: Add a bad word (excluded from suggestions)
data.description_suggestion: Adds a bad word to the search system to exclude it from search suggestions and recommendations. Requires the word to be excluded in the request body. Once added, the bad word will not appear in search suggestions or auto-complete results. Returns the created bad word entry or an error if the word already exists.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description needs expansion to specify required input parameters, the effect on search suggestions, and what is returned. This helps AI agents understand what data to provide and how the operation affects the search suggestion system.

data.summary_suggestion: Remove bad word from suggestion exclusion list
data.description_suggestion: Deletes a bad word from the search system, allowing it to appear in search suggestions again. Requires the bad word identifier as a parameter. Once deleted, the word will be eligible for inclusion in search suggestions and auto-complete results. Returns confirmation of successful deletion or an error if the bad word does not exist.
data.reasoning: Original description is too brief and lacks operational context. Improved version explains what is being deleted (bad word from exclusion list), what input is required (identifier), the consequence (word becomes eligible for suggestions), and what is returned. data.summary_suggestion: Execute full-text search across indexed documents
data.description_suggestion: Executes a full-text search query across indexed documents in the Fess search server. Accepts 14 query parameters including search keywords, filters, pagination, and sorting options.
